title: The 20-year-old who stole the show on Scotland's World Cup return
summary: Ben Gannon-Doak, 20, was instrumental in Scotland's long-awaited World Cup return, helping them secure their first tournament win in 36 years against Haiti. His standout performance marked a significant moment for a Scottish team returning to the competition for the first time since 1990.
content: Ben Gannon-Doak wasn't born when Scotland last played at the men's World Cup. But the 20-year-old was at the heart of their long-awaited return and their first win at the tournament in 36 years as he stole the show against Haiti.

zh.title: 20岁少年闪耀苏格兰世界杯回归
zh.summary: 20岁的本·甘农-多克对苏格兰期待已久的世界杯回归起到了关键作用,帮助球队获得了36年来对阵海地的首场锦标赛胜利。他的出色表现标志着苏格兰队自1990年以来首次重返这项赛事的重要时刻。

title: Could Japan be the World Cup's dark horses?
summary: Japan is emerging as a potential surprise package at the 2026 World Cup, with growing confidence that the team is prepared to exceed their previous tournament achievements. Experts believe they have the potential to advance further than ever before.
content: Japan could be one of the surprise packages of the 2026 World Cup, with growing belief they are ready to go further than ever before.

zh.title: 日本会成为世界杯的黑马吗?
zh.summary: 日本正崭露头角,成为2026年世界杯的潜在黑马,人们越来越相信该队已准备好超越以往的锦标赛成绩。专家们认为他们有潜力比以往任何时候都走得更远。

title: BBC Sport pundits choose England World Cup XIs - who would you pick?
summary: As England prepares for their World Cup campaign under new manager Thomas Tuchel, BBC Sport pundits have selected their ideal starting lineups for the tournament. Tuchel will announce his first official England World Cup squad when the Three Lions face Croatia on Wednesday.
content: Thomas Tuchel will pick his first England World Cup team on Wednesday, when the Three Lions take on Croatia. BBC Sport pundits choose their starting XIs - who would you pick?

title: Leicester close in on Martin appointment
summary: Russell Martin, who guided Southampton to Premier League promotion in 2024, is set to become Leicester's new manager after a spell out of work following his dismissal by Rangers in October. The move represents a significant appointment for the Championship club.
content: Russell Martin, who led Southampton into the Premier League in 2024, has been out of work since being sacked by Rangers in October.

zh.title: 莱斯特城即将官宣马丁为新主帅
zh.summary: 曾于2024年带领南安普顿升入英超的拉塞尔·马丁,在10月被流浪者队解雇后休整一段时间,即将成为莱斯特城的新主帅。这笔交易对这支英冠球队来说是一次重大任命。

title: Fifa to pay Somali referee Artan full World Cup fee
summary: Somali referee Omar Artan will receive his complete World Cup tournament fee from Fifa despite being denied entry to the United States to officiate matches. The decision ensures compensation for the official who was unable to participate in the competition.
content: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was denied entry to the United States to officiate at the World Cup, will still receive his tournament fee from Fifa in full.

title: Smaller than Isle of Man & huge Dutch influence: Curacao making history

content: Curacao has possibly been most famous for its alcoholic drink of the same name - but now the nation is ready to announce itself at the World Cup.

title: Refugee who quit Bayern to create Aussie World Cup dream

content: Nestory Irankunda was born as a refugee in Tanzania before becoming Australian record breaker with goal in victory over Turkey.

title: Vinícius Jr. rescues draw for Brazil against Moroc...
summary: Brazil salvaged a 1-1 draw against Morocco in their World Cup opener with a late Vinícius Jr. goal, but coach Carlo Ancelotti attributed the team's poor start to nerves and pressure. The result highlighted defensive vulnerabilities that could prove costly against stronger opponents.
content: Brazil boss Carlo Ancelotti suggested "nerves" got the better of his players during a dreadful start to their opening World Cup fixture against Morocco as his team settled for a 1-1 draw.

title: Giroud: Pulisic reminded me of Hazard at Chelsea

content: Olivier Giroud has said his former Chelsea and AC Milan teammate Christian Pulisic "reminded him of Eden Hazard."

title: 2 Texas men charged after England WC gear stolen

content: Two men have been charged with one felony count each of receiving stolen property late Saturday after England's national team discovered that some of their equipment had been stolen.

title: Swiss devastated as proud Qatar win 1st WC point
summary: Qatar claimed a dramatic late equalizer to earn a 1-1 draw against Switzerland in Group B, delivering a major upset in the World Cup. The result gives the underdogs crucial momentum despite being heavy tournament underdogs.
content: Qatar scored a stoppage-time goal to earn a shocking 1-1 draw with Group B favorites Switzerland on Saturday.

zh.title: 瑞士失落，卡塔尔赢得首个世界杯积分

title: Scotland ease 'pressure' with 1st WC win since 199...
summary: Scotland secured their first World Cup victory since 1998 with a win over Haiti, easing the psychological burden on Steve Clarke's team. The result provides momentum and confidence heading into the team's next challenge against Morocco.
content: Steve Clarke said his Scotland side's long-awaited World Cup win over Haiti means the team have less pressure on them as they prepare to face Morocco.

zh.title: 苏格兰以首次世界杯胜利缓解"压力"自1998年以来首胜

title: Depay fit to start as Netherlands prepare for Japa...
summary: The Netherlands received positive injury news with Ronald Koeman confirming Memphis Depay and Bart Verbruggen are available to start against Japan in their Group F opener. The availability of these key players strengthens Dutch prospects in a competitive group.
content: Netherlands have been handed a major boost after Ronald Koeman said Memphis Depay and Bart Verbruggen are both fit to start Sunday's Group F opener against Japan.

zh.title: 德佩状态良好，荷兰队备战日本比赛

title: Sources: Chicago want Goretzka, Lewandowski
summary: Chicago is reportedly interested in signing Leon Goretzka and Robert Lewandowski, with the possibility of one German World Cup player extending his U.S. stay beyond the tournament. The transfer speculation highlights the league's ambitions to attract top European talent.
content: As Germany opens its World Cup against Curacao on Sunday, one of its players may end up extending his stay in the United States beyond the tournament.

zh.title: 消息源：芝加哥想要戈雷茨卡和莱万多夫斯基

title: Clinical Australia upset Turkey in World Cup opener
summary: Australia delivered an impressive performance to defeat Turkey in their World Cup opener, with 20-year-old Nestory Irankunda making history as the Socceroos' youngest-ever World Cup goalscorer. The clinical victory sets a strong tone for Australia's tournament campaign.
content: Watch highlights as Australia beat Turkey in their opening match, with 20-year-old Nestory Irankunda becoming the Socceroos's youngest ever World Cup goalscorer.

title: Football Daily
summary: Scotland has returned to the World Cup after a lengthy absence and marked their return with a winning performance in their opening match. The return represents a significant moment for Scottish football after decades away from the tournament.
content: Scotland are back and they've started their World Cup with a win.

zh.title: 每日足球

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 7
summary: This interactive guessing game challenges readers to identify a World Cup player with the number 7, testing football knowledge with minimal attempts required. The feature offers an engaging way for fans to test their knowledge of tournament stars.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜测世界杯7号明星

title: Shirts, stuffed lions & Lego - the stolen England items worth $18,000
summary: Two men face charges for stealing approximately $18,000 worth of property from England's training base in Kansas City, including team shirts, merchandise, and personal items. The theft incident highlights security concerns at major tournament training facilities.
content: Two men are charged for stealing $18,000 worth of property from England at their Kansas City training base.

zh.title: 衬衫、毛绒狮子和乐高——价值1.8万美元的被盗英格兰物品
zh.summary: 两名男子因从堪萨斯城的英格兰训练基地盗窃价值约1.8万美元的财产而面临指控，包括球队衬衫、商品和个人物品。这起盗窃事件突显了主要赛事训练设施的安全隐患。

title: What does 1-0 win mean for Scotland's chances of qualification?
summary: With eight third-place finishers advancing to the knockout rounds, Scotland's opening 1-0 victory could be sufficient to achieve qualification despite potentially finishing third in their group. The narrow win provides hope for the Scottish team's tournament prospects.
content: With eight third-place finishers advancing to the last 32, might three points be enough for Scotland to make history?

zh.title: 1-0胜利对苏格兰晋级前景意味着什么?
zh.summary: 随着八个小组第三名队伍晋级淘汰赛，苏格兰的开局1-0胜利可能足以确保晋级，即使他们可能在小组中排名第三。这场惜胜为苏格兰队的锦标赛前景带来了希望。

title: England's first World Cup training session: What did we learn?
summary: England held their first training session at their Kansas City base in preparation for the World Cup, providing early insights into their tournament preparations. The session offered analysts and fans a glimpse of how the team is shaping up under new management.
content: England have had their first training session in Kansas City - what did we learn?

zh.title: 英格兰首场世界杯训练课：我们学到了什么?
zh.summary: 英格兰在堪萨斯城基地举行了首场世界杯备战训练，为他们的锦标赛准备提供了早期见解。这次训练让分析人士和球迷看到了这支球队在新管理层下的发展状况。

title: Why Haiti v Scotland was antidote to the ills of world football
summary: Scotland's opening World Cup victory over Haiti, though not a stylistically brilliant performance, represented an important return for the nation and a welcome departure from football's broader challenges. The match demonstrated that grit and determination can overcome uncertainty in tournament football.
content: It might have been nervy. It might not have been pretty. But Scotland are here. And Scotland have won. Tom English reports from Boston.

zh.title: 为什么海地对苏格兰的比赛是世界足球痼疾的解药?
zh.summary: 苏格兰在开局世界杯比赛中战胜海地，虽然表现风格并不出色，但代表了苏格兰的重要回归，也是对足球广泛挑战的受欢迎的背离。这场比赛证明了意志力和决心可以在锦标赛足球中克服不确定性。

title: Was this offside? Technology fault leaves questions over VAR images
summary: FIFA blamed a technical fault for delaying VAR images after a controversial offside call in Qatar's World Cup draw with Switzerland. The incident raised questions about the reliability of VAR technology in critical match moments.
content: Fifa have blamed a technical fault for the delay in releasing the VAR images after a potential - and controversial - offside call during Qatar's World Cup draw with Switzerland.

zh.title: 这是越位吗？技术故障引发对VAR图像的质疑
zh.summary: FIFA将VAR图像延迟的原因归咎于技术故障，这发生在卡塔尔与瑞士世界杯平局中的一个有争议的越位判罚之后。该事件引发了人们对VAR技术在关键比赛时刻可靠性的质疑。

title: Spectacular Vinicius Jr goal earns Brazil draw against Morocco
summary: Vinicius Jr scored a spectacular solo goal to secure a draw for five-time World Cup winners Brazil against Morocco at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey. The goal demonstrated the Brazilian forward's individual quality in an opening Group C match.
content: Vinicius Jr scores a spectacular solo goal to earn a draw for five-time winners Brazil against Morocco at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

zh.title: 维尼修斯Jr精彩进球为巴西对阵摩洛哥平局立功
zh.summary: 维尼修斯Jr在新泽西州大都会体育场对阵摩洛哥的比赛中打入精彩进球，为五次世界杯冠军巴西赢得平局。这个进球在C组首场比赛中展现了这位巴西前锋的个人实力。
